meaning: =Sinai Peninsula ;西奈山(基督教<<圣经>>中记载的上帝授摩西十诫之处)
examples: He checked into Cedars Sinai Hospital to dry out.
The Bedouin of Sinai loathe the old order.
I thought God gave the law, the Torah, on Sinai.
The star was released from the Cedar-Sinai Medical Center after a day and a half.
Today, Israel maintains a security buffer between the Egyptian controlled Sinai Peninsula and the Gaza Strip.
